creator: NKoch@gmx.de
text:
Hello Sheldon.
It has 20mb installed.
The only problem for this pre-historic system is the pnp-scanning.
Everything else works. (See my writing ;-)
So this was only an informational not a problem report.
Bye
Norbert.
